title: Dragonlight Router — Implementation Delta & Remediation Plan
description: Gap analysis between current implementation and live-spec acceptance criteria, plus coding standards compliance audit. Produces actionable remediation tasks for parallel agent delegation.

data.title: MBR (Model Based Router) — capability filtering stage

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: MBR filters candidates to those matching DispatchOrder.complexity_tier OR one tier above
MBR excludes backends with circuit_open status
MBR performs graceful upgrade to next tier when zero candidates in requested tier
MBR NEVER downgrades — complex request never routed to medium/haiku tier
MBR includes local providers as unlimited-rate in LBR passthrough

data.remediation: NEW_MODULE — create selection/mbr.py with filter_by_capability(), estimate_complexity(), adjacent-tier upgrade logic

data.title: CBR (Cost Balancing Router) — cost scoring stage

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: CBR filters providers with zero budget remaining
CBR scores by projected cost with budget-pressure weight shifting
CostGovernor activates when daily_spend > 80% of daily_budget
cost_adjusted_weights shifts weight from rank to budget as pressure increases

data.remediation: NEW_MODULE — create selection/cbr.py with cost_scoring(), budget_pressure_weight(), CostGovernor class

data.title: LBR (Load Balancing Router) — load distribution stage

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: LBR implements weighted fair queuing across providers
LBR tracks RPM, RPD, TPM, and daily token cap per provider
LBR enforces max_consecutive_same_provider limit
LBR includes privacy rotation for untrusted trust tier

data.remediation: NEW_MODULE — create selection/lbr.py with weighted_fair_queue(), trust_tier_filter(), privacy_rotation()

data.title: Context Filter — DIAN CECHT trust tier filtering

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: Filters PII based on trust tier before Core-Engine boundary
Implements DIAN CECHT trust tier definitions
Never allows unredacted PII to reach Engine backends

data.remediation: NEW_MODULE — create selection/context_filter.py with filter_by_trust_tier(), redact_pii()

data.title: Dispatch Module — MBR→CBR→LBR cascade composition

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: Implements MBR→CBR→LBR three-function cascade
Handles EngineResponse and DispatchFailure return types
Routes requests through all three stages sequentially

data.remediation: NEW_MODULE — create dispatch/cascade.py with route() function implementing the cascade

data.title: RouterEngine.dispatch() method

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: async def dispatch(self, order: DispatchOrder) -> EngineResponse | DispatchFailure
Wires dispatch.cascade.route() with all required dependencies
Returns EngineResponse on success, DispatchFailure on total cascade failure

data.remediation: METHOD_ADDITION — add dispatch() method to RouterEngine class

data.title: Canonical ScoringWeights and CostGovernor

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: Add ScoringWeights dataclass with canonical weights
Add score_candidate() function using canonical weights
Add CostGovernor class and cost_adjusted_weights() function
Both simple and canonical scoring coexist (backward compatibility)

data.remediation: MODULE_UPDATE — add canonical ScoringWeights, score_candidate, CostGovernor to scoring.py

data.title: HTTP Dispatch Endpoints

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: POST /v1/dispatch — accepts DispatchOrder, returns EngineResponse
POST /v1/retire — marks provider as temporarily unavailable
POST /v1/reinstate — marks provider as available again

data.remediation: ENDPOINT_ADDITION — add dispatch endpoints to server/routes.py

data.title: Result Type Integration

acceptance_criteria_status.criterion: All subsystem methods return Result[Value, Error] types
RouterEngine methods properly unwrap/handle Result types
Error propagation works correctly through call chain

data.remediation: REFACTOR — update callers to handle Result types, add proper error handling
